sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 20.102 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.20)

statement.latex: (Y.\,Barnea, A.\,Shalev). Let$G$be a finitely generated pro-$p$group. Must$G$be$p$-adic analytic if it has finite Hausdorff spectrum with respect to [r]{a)} the$p$-power series? [r]{b)} the iterated$p$-power series? [r]{c)} the lower$p$-series? [r]{d)} the Frattini series? [r]{e)} the dimension subgroup series? { A.\,Thillaisundaram}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
